constraints: Do not build a broad MCP framework or custom registry layer.
Do not start a new large implementation line.
Keep the smoke local-only and bounded.
Do not reuse paused skills-line holds unless they are actually relevant.

portfolio_seed.title: Choose one explicit MCP connector candidate from a real need
portfolio_seed.why: The `mcp` topic already has grounded direction not to build a broad framework, and the next productive move is one explicit connector choice followed by one safe smoke-tested integration.
do_now: Choose one connector candidate tied to a real project need.
Prepare one allow / deny / conditional shortlist for that candidate class.
Design one safe smoke test with rollback before any broader MCP expansion.
do_not_do: Do not build a broad MCP management framework or custom registry layer yet.
Do not open multiple connector lines in parallel from this smoke.
